info.description:
Unified payment routing engine and secure webhook proxies for African developers.

![Paye Logo](/favicon_io/android-chrome-192x192.png)

Production Server: https://paye.africa
Local Server: http://localhost:8080

---
**Testing Guide:**
- **Safe to Test**: Endpoints under the Dashboard and Providers tags are safe to use for CRUD operations. Virtual accounts can be created with `type: static` safely.
- **Use Caution**: Live Transaction initializations will redirect to actual payment gateways and may deduct funds if real card details are entered. Ensure you are using Test API Keys (`X-Paye-API-Key: paye_test_...`) when exploring transaction flows.
- **Misdirected Payments**: These are auto-generated when webhooks fail to find a matching VA. You can list them and mark them as resolved safely.
---

Authentication Modes:
1. Bearer JWT Token: Passed as "Authorization: Bearer <token>". Scoped to Dashboard CRUD resources (projects, provider credentials, webhook routes, logs).
2. API Key Header: Passed as "X-Paye-API-Key: paye_live_..." or "paye_test_...". Scoped to server-to-server transaction initializations, refunds, and payouts.
info.title: Paye API

get.description: Retrieve recent webhook proxy delivery log history (paginated)
Retrieve aggregated payment stats, including volumes, counts, and active providers
List all notifications for the authenticated project

post.description: Mark all unread notifications as read for the authenticated project

get.description: Connect to the Server-Sent Events stream for real-time notifications

delete.description: Delete a specific notification by its ID

post.description: Mark a specific notification as read by its ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all payment providers from the system database

put.description: Update metadata, notes, and test credentials of a payment provider (admin only)

post.description: Toggle the global support status of a payment provider (admin only)

get.description: List all projects belonging to the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new project for the authenticated user

get.description: Get details of a specific project by its ID

delete.description: Delete a specific project by its ID

get.description: Retrieve list of all provider configs for the authenticated user

post.description: Create a provider configuration for the live environment
Create a provider configuration for the test environment

put.description: Update fields of a specific provider config

patch.description: Enable or disable a specific provider configuration

get.description: Generate a statement aggregating volumes across providers, optionally downloading as PDF.
Verify the authenticity of a generated statement PDF using its unique Verification Ref
Generate a statement of transactions for a specific virtual account, optionally downloading as PDF.

post.description: Initialize a subscription from the client SDK using a project's Public ID
Initialize a payment transaction from the client SDK using a project's Public ID

get.description: Serve the Javascript SDK file customized for the merchant's active providers and keys

parameters.description: Merchant or Project Public ID (ends with .js)
parameters.name: publicId

get.description: Retrieve a list of payment transactions for the authenticated merchant.

post.description: Initialize a payment transaction with a selected provider (e.g., Paystack).

get.description: Query and verify a transaction status from the payment provider.
List all virtual accounts associated with the project

post.description: Create a new virtual account for a customer

get.description: Retrieve a list of misdirected payments (e.g. transfers to expired or non-existent virtual accounts)

patch.description: Mark a misdirected payment as resolved

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific virtual account by its PVC ID

put.description: Update virtual account details (e.g. Account Name)

delete.description: Expire (delete/deactivate) a virtual account on the provider

get.description: Generate a statement of transactions for a specific virtual account, optionally downloading as PDF.
List all transactions made to a specific virtual account
get.summary: List transactions for a virtual account

get.description: Retrieve all webhook configs for the authenticated user

post.description: Register a webhook callback target for a specific provider

get.description: Retrieve webhooks logs for the authenticated project scoped by active mode

post.description: Public proxy endpoint that receives webhooks from providers (e.g. Paystack) and forwards them to target URL

ApiKeyAuth.description: The merchant's API Key (e.g., paye_live_... or paye_test_...).
ApiKeyAuth.name: X-Paye-API-Key
